{{Quote|Look, Morgan! Coming out of the sun!|Crowley, to Morgan Katarn|<ref name="Soldier for the Empire" />}}
'''Crowley''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a [[Master Sergeant/Legends|Master Sergeant]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and later a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
After the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] ended, Crowley settled on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] during the [[Declaration of a New Order|declaration]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].<ref name="Soldier for the Empire" /> By [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> she joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to battle against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. She was one of the twenty-six Rebel resistance soldiers who fought with [[Morgan Katarn]] during [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] attack at the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]]. It was she who notified him about the arrival of an assault ship; Katarn recognized it as the same [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] that attacked [[Katarn estate|his farm]].<ref name="Soldier for the Empire" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
